# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to **Sansu UI**! 🎉

Please complete the checklist below before requesting a review.

---

# Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the changes in this pull request.

Related Issue:

Fixes #

---

# Type of Change

Please select all that apply.

* [ ] New Component
* [ ] New Feature
* [ ] Bug Fix
* [ ] Performance Improvement
* [ ] Refactoring
* [ ] Documentation
* [ ] Tests
* [ ] Build / CI
* [ ] Other

---

# Checklist

## General

* [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING.md guide.
* [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards.
* [ ] I have tested my changes locally.
* [ ] The project builds successfully.
* [ ] TypeScript passes without errors.
* [ ] Linting passes.

---

## Components

If this PR adds or modifies a component:

* [ ] The component uses Design Tokens.
* [ ] The component is accessible.
* [ ] Type definitions have been updated.
* [ ] Documentation has been added or updated.
* [ ] Playground demo has been added or updated.

---

## Documentation

* [ ] README files have been updated if necessary.
* [ ] API documentation has been updated.
* [ ] Examples have been updated.

---

## Screenshots

If your changes affect the UI, please attach screenshots or GIFs.

---

# Breaking Changes

Does this PR introduce breaking changes?

* [ ] No
* [ ] Yes (please explain below)

Explanation:

---

# Additional Notes

Add any additional information that reviewers should know.

---

Thank you for helping make **Sansu UI** better! ❤️
